issues.description: buildModeratedPermission only preserves canSubscribe/canPublish/canPublishData/hidden plus canPublishSources. The installed LiveKit ParticipantPermission also has canUpdateMetadata, canSubscribeMetrics, canManageAgentSession, recorder, and agent fields, and RoomServiceClient.updateParticipant documents permission updates as atomic. Passing this partial permission can silently reset any true non-listed permission to false during mute/unmute, which violates the route's narrow media-moderation contract.
issues.recommendation: When current permission exists, preserve the full current permission object and override only canPublishSources. Only synthesize default permission values when current is undefined. Add a regression test with canUpdateMetadata/canSubscribeMetrics true to prove they survive mute and unmute.
